title: Registry Entry Base Schema v1.0.0
description: Base definition for all NDJSON registry entries. Establishes required identity, reference, and governance fields.

id.description: Globally unique entity ID. Format: TYPE-CODE-SEQUENCE (e.g., REG-ARAL-0001).

schemaref.description: Canonical JSON Schema $id this entry conforms to.

deadledgerref.description: Cryptographic attestation reference for provenance and tier validation.

artifactid.description: Content-addressable or implementation-agnostic reference (e.g., ipfs:bafy..., cid:sha256:...).

status.description: Lifecycle state of the registry entry.

tags.description: Lowercase, hyphenated keywords for filtering and categorization.

tier.description: Access tier governing validation rigor and content policies.
